svg.text: The work of bringing people together across institutes, sectors, jurisdictions, and disciplines, to share practice, align direction, and surface
field-level questions. PHIs hold a unique position to convene actors who wouldn't otherwise share a table, including across the red-blue political
PHIs convene actors who wouldn't otherwise share a table,
relationships form and PHIs become the trusted neutral
convener, more actors and funders want in, still more
Communities of practice and learning communities let the
field share practice, which surfaces questions and visible
value, which pulls more people in, which enriches the
National gatherings create visibility and papers, which
lead federal agencies and national partners to host and
sponsor, which funds bigger gatherings and draws more
Convening across the red-blue divide depends on neutral
standing. The deeper PHIs go into policy and politics, the
higher the risk of being cast as partisan, which erodes
Convening replicates who already has access. Resourced
actors show up; hesitant, rural, and under-resourced
communities don't, so outputs reflect who was in the room
Convened only as recipients, it becomes extractive and
erodes trust, feeding B2. Treated as catalysts and co-
conveners, agency builds and participation becomes

text.tspan: The engine: being the one neutral table everyone will sit at is self-reinforcing

g.text: draws actors who won't share a table (+)

text.tspan: Education & Learning: the practice communities compound the field's knowledge.
Federal agencies and national partners host and sponsor the gatherings.
Neutrality is the lever. Take a side and the cross-divide table collapses.
Convening can amplify existing barriers. Vicious unless corrected by B3.

svg.text: Catalyst vs recipient — the lever on B2
